summary: Frontend-only regression on Fork·Fate for two recent changes: 3D parallax mouse-tilt + drop shadow on reaper bg, and bolder/larger reaper-line. All checks pass with no console errors.

verifications.parent_transform_matrix3d: matrix3d(...) with transformStyle: preserve-3d applied to motion.div wrapper
verifications.spin_flow: ZIP 10001 -> Deal Your Fate -> result card rendered with reaper-line
verifications.reaper_line_classes: flex items-center gap-2 font-serif text-xl font-bold italic text-[#E01E26]

critical_code_review_comments: Global window mousemove listener on every render is fine but consider passive listener option for perf on low-end devices.
Home.jsx is 812 lines — consider splitting into hero/filters/result subcomponents for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only the reaper tilt + reaper-line style changes were validated. Full regression across admin/PWA/AdSense/PayPal was not re-run this iteration (unchanged since iteration_25).
